# TextOS

> TextOS is an AI personal operating system that builds and runs online businesses entirely through text. You describe what you do — TextOS researches your market, names your strategy, builds a live website, writes your content calendar, drafts outreach emails, and queues your first tasks. All in one agent session. Free to start.

TextOS is built by Rob Gaudet — systems architect, founder of the Cajun Navy movement, 500,000+ followers, New Orleans, Louisiana.

## Core Product

- [How It Works](https://textos.ai/textos-how-it-works.html): Full walkthrough of the 8-phase agent build — research, brand strategy, live site, content calendar, platform bios, pitch email, market research, and task queue.
- [Product Vision](https://textos.ai/textos.html): The full TextOS product philosophy and roadmap.
- [Why I Built This](https://textos.ai/founder.html): Rob Gaudet's founder story — why a 30-year systems architect built a product for non-technical people.

## Landing Pages

- [Landing v4](https://textos.ai/landing-v4.html): Current primary landing page. Numbered feature sections, founder story, reviews, FAQ, and pricing.
- [Landing v3](https://textos.ai/landing-v3.html): Previous landing page with pain/shift/what structure.

## Free AI Readiness Diagnosis

Four versions of the free AI Readiness Diagnosis tool — each with a different hook angle. These pages help small business owners diagnose their readiness for AI-powered operations.

- [ideas.html](https://textos.ai/ideas.html): Main diagnosis page — "Is Your Business Ready for AI?"
- [ideas-a.html](https://textos.ai/ideas-a.html): Angle — "Right Now Someone Is Choosing Your Competitor"
- [ideas-b.html](https://textos.ai/ideas-b.html): Angle — "The Best Operators Know Their Numbers. Do You?"
- [ideas-c.html](https://textos.ai/ideas-c.html): Angle — "You're Putting In the Work. Why Isn't It Paying Off?"

## Pricing

- Free plan: Full 8-phase build, live site at yourhandle.textos.ai, no card required, no expiration.
- Founder Lifetime: $49.99 one-time, then $9.99/month locked forever (1,000 slots only).
- Core: $29.99/month — agent executes tasks, posts content, sends outreach.

Start free: https://app.textos.ai
Founding member purchase: https://buy.stripe.com/5kQ7sEdJ22QTetYeOZ0oM00
